frontmatter.name: doc-for-agent
frontmatter.description: Generate and maintain AGENTS documentation for coding agents.

default_description: Project documentation bootstrapper for coding agents. Generates lean or layered AGENTS directories from the real repository structure.
post_install_notes: Use `docagent init --ai claude` as the recommended product entry for this platform.
Restart Claude Code so the skill is reloaded in the next session.
Use the repository-local install when you want the project to carry its own skill wrapper.
